writeups.title: TryHackMe - Mr. Robot Walkthrough
writeups.summary: A comprehensive walkthrough of the Mr. Robot CTF challenge on TryHackMe covering Nmap scans, WordPress enumeration, credential cracking, and Linux privilege escalation.

writeups.title: HackTheBox - Legacy Walkthrough
writeups.summary: Walkthrough of Legacy on HackTheBox. This is a classic Windows XP machine vulnerable to MS08-067 and MS17-010 (EternalBlue).
